classified_questions.question: How is the circle with center $C$ related to triangle $PQR$?
classified_questions.label: f

classified_questions.question: Can you explain why any segment from a vertex of $PQR$ to $C$ is an angle bisector?

classified_questions.question: How do we use the fact that $RC$ is an angle bisector to find $\angle QRP$?

classified_questions.question: What is the sum of the measures of the internal angles of triangle $PQR$?
classified_questions.label: r

classified_questions.question: Can you explain why we subtract the measures of $\angle PQR$ and $\angle QRP$ from $180^\circ$ to find $\angle QPR$?
